data.name: LUST & MAGIC ✨
data.detailed_description:
LUST & MAGIC ✨ 是一款成人視覺小說，帶有 point-and-click 探索元素，你將扮演剛繼承古老學院的叛逆魔法師。

在 Freya（以神秘貓的形態出現）的引導下，你開始修復學院大廳，招募第一批學生，並挑戰魔法部過時魔法系統的極限。


邂逅與探索
在周邊地點旅行以收集資源並發現秘密，遇見商人、旅店老闆、草藥師、當地漁夫和 Silvana——與你共享第一場親密場景。

初級魔法與任務
從你的法術書中學習基礎魔法，並完成簡短的支線任務，包括驅逐元素威脅。


學院修復
修復城堡部分區域，吸引首批有抱負的魔法學徒，如 Athena，並透過 point-and-click 機制幫助他們收集物品。

激情邂逅
享受成人場景，加深你魔法師的個人旅程。


在 LUST & MAGIC ✨ 中塑造你年輕學院的命運，並在挑戰魔法世界現狀的同時，為即將到來的衝突做好準備。

data.short_description: LUST & MAGIC ✨ 是一款視覺小說，你將扮演叛逆魔法師和魔法學院的新校長。
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: LUST & MAGIC ✨
data.detailed_description:
LUST & MAGIC ✨ is an adult visual novel with point-and-click exploration, placing you in the role of a rebellious wizard who’s just inherited an ancient academy.

Guided by Freya (appearing as a mysterious cat), you begin restoring its halls, recruiting your first student, and testing the boundaries of the Ministry’s outdated magical system.

Meet and Explore

Travel through nearby locations to gather resources and uncover secrets, encountering characters like merchant, innkeeper, herbalist, a local fisherman, and Silvana—who shares your first intimate scene.

Early Magic & Quests

Learn basic spells from your spellbook and undertake brief side quests, including banishing an elemental threat.

Academy Restoration

Repair portions of the castle, attract your first aspiring mage, Athena, and help her gather items via point-and-click mechanics.

Steamy Encounters

enjoy adult scenes that deepen your wizard’s personal journey.

Shape the fate of your fledgling academy in LUST & MAGIC ✨, and prepare for the rising conflict as you challenge the magical world’s status quo.

data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Dutch, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Romanian, Thai, Turkish, Hungarian, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher
  • Processor: Intel or AMD
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
